title: Remove mesh review worktree routing — review works from anywhere
description: Remove the worktree routing guard from mesh review. Reviewers do not need the implementer's worktree — they need the branch and the PR URL. mesh review should work from the shared root, any lane worktree, or any machine. Replace the current 'Resolved workspace differs from current path / Next: cd' output with the PR URL, branch, acceptance criteria, and evidence summary. The implementer workspace guard on mesh pr (MESH-18) is correct and stays; this change only affects mesh review.
acceptance_criteria: mesh review works from the shared root without prompting to cd anywhere
mesh review output shows: PR URL, branch, base, acceptance criteria, evidence, review status
The 'Resolved workspace differs' / 'REQUIRED: cd' output is removed from mesh review
mesh review on a non-owning machine shows the same output (worktree path omitted or marked local-only)
mesh pr workspace guard (exit 1 when not in lane) is unaffected
Tests cover: review from shared root succeeds, review output contains PR URL and acceptance criteria
